🫁 Lungs = Lungs! If unfolded flat, human lungs would cover a tennis court!
💀 Skeleton = Skeleton! 206 bones — 300 at birth (they fuse together as you grow!)
🫃 Stomach = Stomach! Produces 2 litres of hydrochloric acid daily — strong enough to dissolve metal!

🦷 Teeth = Teeth! The hardest substance in the human body — harder than bone!
👅 Tongue = Tongue! Has about 10,000 taste buds — each lasts only about 10 days before being replaced!
🩸 Blood = Blood! A single drop contains 5 million red blood cells — red blood cells live only 120 days!
🧬 DNA double helix = DNA! If you stretched out all the DNA in a single human cell, it would be 2 metres long!

🕌 Mosque + 🌙 Islamic crescent = Mosque! Houses of Islamic worship — minarets were used to call people to prayer before loudspeakers!

🍚 Rice + 🍋 Rice vinegar = Sushi Rice! The perfectly seasoned, slightly sticky rice that makes sushi — takes years to master!
🦴 Bones + 💧 Water + ⏰ Long simmer = Stock! The foundation of French cuisine — the more you reduce it, the more intensely flavored it gets!
